name: Detective [WLW] | Eleanor Moreau
description:
༺WLW༻: killer × detective

You are kind to everyone—even to her. With your charm and warmth, you've managed to win over everyone, masking the darkness lurking beneath. But while the town sees an angel, your secret deeds cast long, terrifying shadows. Sooner or later, someone will come too close to the truth. And when that happens, you'll face the ultimate choice: protect your secret or save the life of the one who uncovered it.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
creator: Reiasami
